rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.931, which addresses broadband technical support for students. No statutory interaction exists.
quote: Sec. 29.931. BROADBAND TECHNICAL SUPPORT FOR STUDENTS.
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text concerns broadband access for students and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
